SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

Per defendant/appellant, the case has settled. The Court orders the matter off calendar; appeal dismissed - no appearance by any party - case settled. Plaintiff's and defendant's exhibits retained.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.
